title: pteridium rostratum
intro: Pteridium rostratum, also known as the bracken fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dennstaedtiaceae. Traditionally, the roots and rhizomes of the bracken fern have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of bracken fern include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Bracken fern can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the roots and rhizomes in hot water, and it can also be used as a tincture or in capsule form for convenient consumption.
